arts.ttl: Why Ronald Araújo could still be on his way out at Barcelona despite new contract
arts.sum: Barcelona have extended Ronald Araujo's contract at the club, but it doesn't seem as though the Uruguay defender has a long-term future under manager Hansi Flick.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Barcelona v Atalanta: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys is set to host a thrilling Champions League encounter as Barcelona welcome Atalanta on Wednesday. This match marks the final fixture of the league phase, with both teams eyeing a strong finish to their group stage campaigns. arts.ttl: Entourage ‘formally denies’ offering Manchester City player to Barcelona – Winter exit claims quickly rubbished
arts.sum: Jérémy Doku’s entourage have dismissed claims of offering him to Barcelona on a loan deal in the winter market. That’s according to Belgian Journalist Sacha Tavolieri, and he took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to provide the 22-year-old’s stance. arts.ttl: How will Barcelona line up against Atalanta?
arts.sum: Pedri is in line to return to the starting XI after missing the Valencia game due to illness and Gavi may also get the nod after also getting the night off on Sunday. Barcelona wrap up their Champions League campaign on Wednesday against Serie A high-flyers Atalanta in what promises to be a fun game at Montjuic.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe Targets Robert Lewandowski As La Liga Scoring Race Heats Up Between Clasico Rivals
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Kylian Mbappé is now just two goals behind Barcelona's Robert Lewandowski in the La Liga scoring race.
